entities.name: Workout Tracker Database
entities.context: SQLite-based workout logging system with support for multiple data sources

entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Fitness tracker used as a data source for workout observations, with idempotency via external_id

entities.name: workout_observations
entities.context: Database table storing workout data with source tracking and external IDs

entities.name: Multi-Source Fitness Logging
entities.context: Architecture pattern where workouts can come from manual entry or device sync (Fitbit), unified in one schema

entities.name: Idempotency
entities.context: Design principle applied to Fitbit imports — duplicate log_ids are detected and skipped rather than re-inserted

relationships.context: Fitbit serves as an automated data source for the workout database via external_id-based sync
Database checks for existing external_id before inserting Fitbit data to prevent duplicates
System supports both manual_text and fitbit sources with a unified workouts/observations schema
